prompt_order.title: LATER_WAVE_BOUNDARY_RECONCILIATION-0
human_review_requirements: distributed_authority_model_changes FULL review if later-wave reconciliation reinterprets handoff transfer proof-anchor or convergence posture
trust_root_governance_changes FULL review if later-wave reconciliation drifts into live trust execution or trust-root promotion
stop_conditions: stop if Ζ-B0 tries to admit any later-wave family from implementation evidence alone
stop if Ζ-B0 widens first-wave doctrine into realization claims
stop if authority handoff trust convergence or receipt-pipeline blockers are restated as solved without new proof
notes: This prompt should normalize the later-wave boundary against the completed first-wave doctrine packet.
Outputs must remain planning and admission law rather than later-wave execution.

prompt_order.title: LATER_WAVE_PREREQUISITE_MATRIX_REFRESH-0
dependencies: completed Ζ-B0 later-wave boundary reconciliation outputs
human_review_requirements: receipt_and_provenance_reclassification FULL review if later-wave matrix work tries to promote local traces or mirrors into canonical live receipts
lifecycle_manager_semantics FULL review if later-wave matrix work tries to widen cutover legality from rehearsal doctrine
stop_conditions: stop if Ζ-B1 erases the distinction between doctrine admission and realization
stop if Ζ-B1 treats trust or replication substrate as proof of later-wave readiness
stop if Ζ-B1 downgrades blocked or future-only families without explicit rationale
notes: This prompt should refresh family-level later-wave prerequisites rather than reopening first-wave law.
Outputs must preserve first-wave freeze and active blocker truth.

prompt_order.title: LATER_WAVE_EXECUTION_GATES_REFRESH-0
dependencies: completed Ζ-B0 later-wave boundary reconciliation outputs
completed Ζ-B1 later-wave prerequisite matrix outputs
human_review_requirements: distributed_authority_model_changes FULL review if refreshed later-wave gates imply authority movement or convergence beyond proven scope
trust_root_governance_changes FULL review if refreshed later-wave gates imply live trust execution
stop_conditions: stop if Ζ-B2 admits later-wave family execution without explicit blocker narrowing recorded in Ζ-B0 and Ζ-B1
stop if Ζ-B2 loosens first-wave proof-only or bounded-only guardrails
stop if Ζ-B2 treats admission as realization
notes: This prompt should freeze later-wave consequences only after the reconciliation and matrix refresh exist.
Outputs must remain gate law and not later-wave execution.

prompt_order.title: POST_LATER_WAVE_GATE_FREEZE_REASSESSMENT-0
human_review_requirements: checkpoint must verify first-wave families remained bounded-only or proof-only
checkpoint must verify no later-wave family execution was smuggled in during the planning and gate-refresh band
stop_conditions: stop before any later-wave family prompt until this checkpoint exists
notes: This checkpoint decides whether any later-wave family can even be reconsidered.

stability.replacement_target: later post-Ζ-B next-order artifact may refine sequence without replacing the ordering law frozen here
